providers.description: BANK OF AI LLM API provides paid access to first-party model inference through x402. It exposes model discovery, OpenAI-compatible chat completions, and Claude-compatible messages so agents, scripts, and applications can call LLMs without embedding an upstream BANK OF AI API key.

zh-CN.description: BANK OF AI 大模型 API 通过 x402 提供付费模型推理能力，包含模型发现、OpenAI-compatible 聊天补全和 Claude-compatible Messages。调用方不需要暴露上游 BANK OF AI API key，可以通过 CLI、Agent 或应用按次支付调用。
zh-CN.subtitle: 兼容 OpenAI 的大模型推理接口
zh-CN.title: BANK OF AI 大模型 API
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要按次付费调用大模型的应用、Agent 和命令行流程。先用 /v1/models 查询可用模型，再用 /v1/chat/completions 发起 OpenAI 风格请求，或用 /v1/messages 发起 Claude 风格消息请求。

providers.subtitle: OpenAI-compatible LLM inference
providers.title: BANK OF AI LLM API
providers.title_zh: BANK OF AI 大模型 API
providers.use_case: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs on-demand LLM inference with x402 payment. Start with /v1/models to choose a model, then call /v1/chat/completions for OpenAI-style requests or /v1/messages for Claude-style message payloads.
